diffs.diff:
--- a/test_local.py
+++ b/test_local.py
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+import subprocess, os, shutil

+from pathlib import Path

+

+# Make a tiny test dir with 2 val objects

+src = Path('/data/val')

+dst = Path('/tmp/test_input')

+if dst.exists():

+    shutil.rmtree(dst)

+dst.mkdir(parents=True)

+

+uids = sorted([d.name for d in src.iterdir() if d.is_dir()])[:2]

+for uid in uids:

+    obj_dst = dst / uid

+    obj_dst.mkdir()

+    shutil.copy(src/uid/'input.png', obj_dst/'input.png')

+    shutil.copy(src/uid/'cameras.json', obj_dst/'cameras.json')

+

+print('Test dir:', dst, 'with', uids)
